description:
Production error and exception monitoring — HTTP 4xx/5xx rates, spike detection, service and endpoint error attribution, exception grouping, DLQ and worker failures, Kafka producer errors, MongoDB failures, deserialization errors, and live error log streams.

How to use this dashboard: Start from the Error Summary row to confirm current impact, then use the alerting and anomaly panels to detect new regressions, and finally drill into service, endpoint, and exception breakdowns to isolate root cause. Prometheus-backed panels are intended for alerting and SLO checks; Loki-backed panels provide log-derived exception taxonomy and incident investigation context.

panels.title: HTTP 4xx Rate
panels.description: Current rate of HTTP 4xx (client error) responses across selected applications.

panels.title: HTTP 5xx Rate
panels.description: Current rate of HTTP 5xx (server error) responses across selected applications.

panels.title: DLQ Messages Received
panels.description: Total DLQ messages received via Kafka by the dlq-service. Zero means no jobs reached the DLQ in this window (healthy state) — this is independent of dlq-service HTTP traffic.

panels.title: Worker Job Failures
panels.description: Total worker job failures logged by job-worker over the dashboard time range, including the current 'Job processing failed' path and older 'Job ... failed' variants.

panels.title: Retry/DLQ Handoff Failures
panels.description: Total Retry/DLQ handoff failures logged by job-worker over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Errors (Range)
panels.description: Total Kafka producer record errors across selected applications over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: MongoDB Failed Commands (Range)
panels.description: Total failed MongoDB driver commands across selected applications over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Deserialization Errors (Range)
panels.description: Total Kafka deserialization errors across consumer services over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: retry-dispatcher Requeue Failures
panels.description: Total retry-dispatcher requeue failures over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: HTTP Errors by Service
panels.description: HTTP client and server error rate by application over time.

panels.title: Error Count by Service (per interval)
panels.description: Error-level log rate per service over time.

panels.title: HTTP 4xx / 5xx Rate by Service
panels.description: HTTP 4xx and 5xx error rates per application over time.

panels.title: Kafka Lag vs Worker Failures
panels.description: Correlation view comparing Kafka consumer lag against the aggregate error-event rate from application logs.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate (records/s)
panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate by application and topic.

panels.title: MongoDB Commands Rate (Success vs Failed)
panels.description: MongoDB driver command rates comparing successful and failed commands.

panels.title: DLQ Events — Consumed & Persistence Failures
panels.description: DLQ message consumption rate versus persistence failure rate over time.

panels.title: Worker — Job Failures & Retry Handoff Errors
panels.description: Worker job failure rate and retry/DLQ handoff error rate over time, including the current 'Job processing failed' log path.

panels.title: Kafka Deserialization Errors & Requeue Failures
panels.description: Kafka deserialization error rate per consumer service and retry-dispatcher requeue failure rate.

panels.title: HTTP Exceptions by Type & Service
panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by exception type and application (excluding 'None').

panels.title: Top Exception Classes (logs/interval)
panels.description: Top 10 Java exception/error class names extracted from log lines across selected services using Loki regexp parsing.

panels.title: HTTP 5xx Error Ratio
panels.description: Alert-friendly percent of total HTTP traffic currently returning 5xx responses across selected applications. Sustained values above 1% indicate active user-facing impact; above 5% should page in production.

panels.title: HTTP Error Spike Score

targets.expr: ((sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", status=~"4..|5..", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[5m]), 0)) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", status=~"4..|5..", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[1h]), 0)), 1e-6))

panels.description: Ratio of the current 5-minute HTTP error rate to the trailing 1-hour baseline. Values above 1.5 indicate an emerging spike; above 3 indicates a sharp regression that is suitable for alerting.

panels.title: Error Log Volume Anomaly
panels.description: Compares current 5-minute Loki error-log volume to a 1-hour rolling baseline normalized to a 5-minute bucket. A widening gap highlights log-volume anomalies using the actual log backend rather than an app metric proxy.

panels.title: Top Erroring Service / Endpoint

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (service, uri) (clamp_min(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{service=~"$app", status=~"4..|5..", uri!~"/actuator.*"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Top 10 HTTP service and endpoint combinations by current error rate. Use this to identify the single API surface contributing the most client or server errors during an incident.

panels.title: Grouped Exceptions (logs/interval)
panels.description: Operational exception groups built from Loki log patterns. This collapses noisy class-level detail into a smaller set of categories that are easier to alert on and triage during incidents.

panels.title: Error & Exception Logs — All Services
panels.description: Live stream of error and exception log lines from all selected services.

panels.title: Top 5 HTTP 5xx Endpoints
panels.description: Top 5 HTTP endpoints by current 5xx response rate, excluding actuator routes.

panels.title: HTTP Error Budget Burn Rate
panels.description: Ratio of 5xx request rate to total HTTP request rate. Red threshold line marks the 99.9% SLO budget (0.1% error rate).

title: Error Monitoring
